name: Color Lab
short_description: Color Lab is a puzzle game in which you let the correct colors to be routed to the correct destinations. Multiple color operators are available for operation on colors. Try to use some logic and mathematics to figure out those RGB things.
detailed_description:
Color Lab is a puzzle game in which you let the correct colors be routed to the correct destinations. Each color is represented by a composition of three channels - Red, Green and Blue. In order to complete a level, what you need to do is to make up the requested color out of the three channels and find a path to the specified position.

Features

  • Over 100 challenging levels to go;
  • multiple color operators provided, such as inverter and adder;

Filter Mode

  • Free construction of logical operation lines;
  • Highly challenging;

    Try to use some logic and mathematics to figure out those RGB things and solve the problems.
